experience.title: Customer Relationship Manager

experience.title: Service Manager English Teacher
experience.description: Led operational development and delivery of blended eLearning solutions, designing and managing off-site sales and training programmes for diverse client needs. Introduced risk assessment and best practice procedures, scaling initiatives from branch level to a network of 65 locations. Managed direct line teams, organised quarterly team-building events for staff and clients, and delivered personalised training to large multinationals and over 2,300 students. Monitored classroom and teacher performance through audits, proactively supporting ongoing development and quality assurance across the organisation.

experience.title: Director Of Operations
experience.description: Oversaw multi-site operations, driving significant sales growth and operational improvement through the adoption of best practices and streamlined procedures. Led B2B and B2C business development, delivering new projects and customised training solutions for clients across aviation, logistics, energy, legal, and medical sectors. Directed national consultancy services for strategic integration initiatives, including large-scale compliance and H&S rollouts across 153 branches. Built and managed cross-functional teams, delivering tailored training programmes for executives, industry professionals, and university students to advance skills and support career development.

experience.title: Branch Manager Director Of Personnel
experience.description: Oversaw multi-branch operations and led direct management of 34 teachers and 8 sales staff, driving performance, engagement, and development across 2 locations. Delivered sustained sales growth by introducing leadership workshops, restructuring branch procedures, and implementing initiatives that enhanced customer experiences and increased sales by 20%. Coordinated B2B and B2C sales projects, recruited internationally and domestically for support personnel, and allocated resources across 20 branches to support business objectives. Fostered partner relationships and promoted company culture through events and tailored communication strategies, contributing to regional sales expansion.

experience.title: Founder CEO
experience.description: Co-founded and led a nationally recognised training and education provider, driving business growth from inception to successful acquisition. Set the strategic vision and steered company development, specialising in bespoke L&D solutions for clients across sectors. Directly managed, recruited, and coached cross-functional teams (18 full-time, 30 part-time), embedding a culture of excellence, continuous development, and high client satisfaction. Delivered scalable service innovation, securing major contracts and expanding into government, corporate, and international markets. Achieved market leadership through partnerships, client trust, and impactful brand-building strategies, growing to serve over 1,600 clients in two years. Oversaw all operational, financial, and commercial activities, ensuring agility, transparency, and sustainable growth in a dynamic environment.

experience.title: Director Of Operations Business Development
experience.description: Served on the executive team, shaping strategic direction and commercial growth for a leading provider of training and services across diverse industries. Led and directly managed multi-site teams, overseeing day-to-day operations for over 60 personnel and driving alignment across 25 branches. Built and coordinated high-performing cross-functional teams, fostering collaboration and accountability to deliver operational excellence and transformational change. Championed CRM integration, pricing modernisation, and a comprehensive Order to Cash (O2C) process, driving billing, credit control, collections, and cash flow management for 25 branches. Harnessed data-driven insights and technology-enabled solutions to optimise operations and inform strategic decisions across the organisation. Embedded a culture of continuous improvement, implementing change management and tailored L&D programs for 450+ staff, enhancing company vision and client satisfaction.

experience.title: Service Supervisor
experience.description: Returned to the UK to take on a leadership role, overseeing daily operations and client service while exploring new career opportunities for advancement. Applied transferable skills in team management, customer engagement, and process improvement, strengthening branch performance and supporting a culture of reliability, collaboration, and service excellence.

experience.title: Key Accounts Business Development Manager
experience.organization: The Chartered Institute of Environmental Health
experience.description: Delivering business growth and strategic client partnerships in a leading professional body, leveraging data-driven insight and cross-functional collaboration at the executive level. I combine strategic insight with hands-on client management to drive growth, strengthen partnerships, and position the organisation competitively in the market. Leveraging my MBA expertise, I integrate Business Strategy frameworks such as SWOT, PESTEL, Porter’s Five Forces, and the Ansoff Matrix to assess opportunities, mitigate risks, and deliver measurable results. Key Achievements Sales Strategy & New Logo Acquisition: Developed and executed sales strategies that consistently exceeded targets by up to 20%, driving competitive growth and market expansion. Successfully won and onboarded new logos, broadening the client portfolio and strengthening market position with executive-led, data-driven approaches. Account Management & Retention Successfully managed and nurtured major accounts, driving a 460% increase in repeat business and reactivating dormant clients. Applied frameworks including RACI, Gap Analysis, and the Ansoff Matrix to identify cross-selling potential and strengthen client engagement. Multi-Level Engagement Built and maintained senior-level and multi-stakeholder relationships across client organisations, ensuring alignment of services with business goals. Applied leadership and financial acumen to manage resources effectively while supporting market development and partnership opportunities. Business Development & Strategy Contributed to wider business development initiatives, supporting growth across Training (instructor-led and eLearning), Assurance, and Events. Ensured alignment with departmental budgets and forecasts, consistently meeting or surpassing sales objectives.

experience.title: Project Manager Lead Consultant
experience.description: Led a strategic project on the future of business operating models, analysing the impact of AI, 6G, IoT, and blockchain on agility, resilience, and growth. Directed a cross-functional team of 10, delivering actionable frameworks that addressed risk, ESG integration, and the complexities of decentralised and agile operating structures. Translated complex data and academic research into board-level insights, guiding organisations on data-enabled strategies and sustainable transformation. Drove stakeholder alignment, embedding technological innovation and cultural adaptation across decentralised teams to strengthen long-term organisational resilience. Capstone Project: Data-Enabled World: Business Operating Models Adapt and Thrive or Die
